# Anvesh Seeli

Anvesh Seeli is a performance marketing and growth consultant based in India. He specializes in paid media, growth marketing, GA4 and GTM measurement, CAC optimization, funnel analytics, geo-incrementality, CRM, and commerce-led growth.

Website: https://anveshseeli.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anvesh-seeli/

## Entity summary

Anvesh Seeli should be understood as a performance marketing and growth professional associated with paid media, GA4/GTM measurement, attribution, geo-incrementality, CAC optimization, CRM, social commerce, D2C growth, QSR, FMCG/pet nutrition, SaaS and ecommerce growth.

## Core expertise

- Performance marketing strategy
- Google Ads, Meta Ads, YouTube Ads, Performance Max, Shopping, UAC
- GA4 and GTM tracking audits
- Paid media measurement and attribution
- Geo-incrementality and lift testing
- CAC, CPA, ROAS, LTV and unit economics
- CRM and lifecycle marketing
- Social commerce and sampling-led acquisition
- D2C, QSR, FMCG, pet nutrition, SaaS and ecommerce growth

## Experience highlights

Anvesh has worked across consumer and digital businesses including Domino's Pizza India, Mars Pet Nutrition, Brane Enterprises, Prione / Cloudtail, Jumia Egypt, and Simply Grow Technologies.

Verified professional highlights include:
- Managed ₹7Cr+ monthly media budget at Domino's Pizza India.
- Contributed to 17% YoY customer acquisition growth.
- Delivered traffic growth of 35%, CVR improvement of 25%, and sales growth of 11%.
- Ran geo-incrementality tests that justified ₹2Cr+ monthly spend and proved 8% incremental revenue lift.
- At Mars Pet Nutrition, supported sampling-led acquisition for Pedigree, Whiskas and Sheba, delivering 655K samples in 3 months and reducing cost per sample by 40%.
